extract: Gimmighoul (Japanese: コレクレー Collecurei) is a Ghost-type Pokémon introduced in Generation IX. It evolves into Gholdengo when leveled up while the player has 999 Gimmighoul Coins, consuming them in the process. Once the requirements are met, it is impossible to cancel the Evolution. Gimmighoul has two forms: Chest Form and Roaming Form. Chest Form Gimmighoul only appears in the core series, in which it is the only form that can be natively battled and caught, while Roaming Form Gimmighoul will flee when interacted with, leaving behind Gimmighoul Coins. Roaming Form appears in Pokémon GO, where it can be caught; it can then be transferred to the core series games via the GO Transporter.
